## Summary

## Type of Change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Protocol semantics
- [ ] Test vectors/conformance
- [ ] Governance/community files

## Protocol Impact
- [ ] No protocol behavior change
- [ ] Backward-compatible change
- [ ] Potentially breaking change

Affected sections/files:

## Validation
- [ ] Updated related docs
- [ ] Added/updated test vectors if behavior changed
- [ ] If protocol semantics changed, added vector delta or documented why none is required
- [ ] Noted compatibility or migration impact
- [ ] If expected outcomes changed, included protocol-change justification and reason-code delta notes

## Risks / Open Questions
